info.title: Inventory Web Services
info.description: [dsinv]: Inventory REST Services provided by the OrderDataMgmt service for Supply & Demand objects.
info.summary: APIs for managing Inventory and related entities

parameters.name: inventoryPlanId
parameters.description:
ID of Inventory Plan to Return Supplies For.
* Required: Must not be empty if "id" is not provided.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description:
Comma(,) separated list of IDs of Supplies to Return.
* Required: Must not be empty if "inventoryPlanId" is not provided.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of items to be skipped from the beginning of the result

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to be returned per page, accepts a maximum value of 100

parameters.name: UoM
parameters.description: Toggle to specify whether to return units and quantities as originally requested or converted to the MKS (Meter-Kilogram-Second) system.

200.description: Request successful. Return a pageable list of Supplies.

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

404.description: NOT FOUND. The server has not found anything matching the Request-URI. No indication is given of whether the condition is temporary or permanent. The 410 (Gone) status code SHOULD be used if the server knows, through some internally configurable mechanism, that an old resource is permanently unavailable and has no forwarding address. This status code is commonly used when the server does not wish to reveal exactly why the request has been refused, or when no other response is applicable.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

inventoryPlanId.description: Parent Inventory Plan ID of the Supply.

supplyProducerName.description:
Name of the Supply Producer.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the name. It will be be populated by the name of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the name of the Work Order Operation of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the name must be provided to identify the Supply.

availabilityDate.description:
Availability date of the Supply.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the availability date. It will be be populated by the Scheduled End Date of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the Scheduled End Date of the Work Order Operation of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the availability date must be provided.

magnitude.description:
Magnitude of the Supply.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the magnitude. It will be be populated by the Magnitude of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the Magnitude of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the magnitude must be provided.

unit.description:
Unit of the Supply.
Not used for Magnitude Each.
Please use values from the enums below accordingly; starting with [m2] for Magnitude Area, [m] for Magnitude Length, [kg] for Magnitude Mass and [m3] for Magnitude Volume.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the unit. It will be be populated by the Unit of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the Unit of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the unit can be provided.

onHandQuantity.description:
On Hand Quantity of the Supply.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the on hand quantity. It will be be populated by the Order Quantity of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the Quantity of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the on hand quantity must be provided.

serialItemNumber.description: Serial Item Number of the Supply.

lotItemNumber.description: Lot Item Number of the Supply.

supplyProducerName.description:
Name of the Supply Producer.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the name. It will be be populated by the name of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the name of the Work Order Operation of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the name must be provided to identify the Supply.

availabilityDate.description:
Availability date of the Supply.
If the source of the Supply Producer is OrderDataMgmt, do not provide the availability date. It will be be populated by the Scheduled End Date of the Work Order if the Supply Producer type is Work Order or by the Scheduled End Date of the Work Order Operation of the Item Specification if the Supply Producer type is Item Specification.
Else, the availability date must be provided.
